mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (id, recipient_id, actor_id, type, entity_type, entity_id, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{recipientId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{content}, 0, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND type = #{type}
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
